original_description: Use this skill whenever the user is doing a K-12 mistake notebook workflow in Obsidian: intake or organize wrong-answer records from photos/text, create or update `data/mistake-notebook/` files, fill `type: mistake-record` frontmatter, ask what is due for review, show a text review list before exporting subject-specific PDFs, generate similar practice, analyze weak points or monthly reports, configure daily reminders, batch-update review progress, or do first-run dependency checks. Trigger even if the user only mentions 错题、错题本、错题整理、错题录入、复习提醒、举一反三、`mistake-record`、`data/mistake-notebook/`, Obsidian frontmatter, or script names like `check-deps.py`, `export-printable.py`, `generate-practice.py`, `weak-points.py`, `daily-review-reminder.py`, `update-review.py`. Do not use for single-problem tutoring without archiving, generic study plans, Anki decks, spreadsheet ranking, receipt OCR, or unrelated repo development.
best_description: Use this skill for K-12 wrong-answer management workflows. Trigger when users: archive mistakes from photos/text into Obsidian, query today's review schedule, update review progress after studying, analyze weak knowledge points, generate practice variants, or set up daily reminders. Keywords: 错题, 错题本, 复习, 艾宾浩斯, type:mistake-record, data/mistake-notebook/, update-review, daily-review-reminder, weak-points. Do not use for single-problem tutoring without record-keeping, generic study planners, Anki decks, or unrelated development tasks.
final_description: Use this skill for K-12 wrong-answer management workflows. Trigger when users: archive mistakes from photos/text into Obsidian, query today's review schedule, update review progress after studying, analyze weak knowledge points, generate practice variants, or set up daily reminders. Keywords: 错题, 错题本, 复习, 艾宾浩斯, type:mistake-record, data/mistake-notebook/, update-review, daily-review-reminder, weak-points. Do not use for single-problem tutoring without record-keeping, generic study planners, Anki decks, or unrelated development tasks.

history.description: Use this skill whenever the user is doing a K-12 mistake notebook workflow in Obsidian: intake or organize wrong-answer records from photos/text, create or update `data/mistake-notebook/` files, fill `type: mistake-record` frontmatter, ask what is due for review, show a text review list before exporting subject-specific PDFs, generate similar practice, analyze weak points or monthly reports, configure daily reminders, batch-update review progress, or do first-run dependency checks. Trigger even if the user only mentions 错题、错题本、错题整理、错题录入、复习提醒、举一反三、`mistake-record`、`data/mistake-notebook/`, Obsidian frontmatter, or script names like `check-deps.py`, `export-printable.py`, `generate-practice.py`, `weak-points.py`, `daily-review-reminder.py`, `update-review.py`. Do not use for single-problem tutoring without archiving, generic study plans, Anki decks, spreadsheet ranking, receipt OCR, or unrelated repo development.

train_results.query: 数学错题 id 20260331-001 复习完了，掌握得一般。用 update-review 批量更新今日数学，下次复习日期按艾宾浩斯算好告诉我。
我想在 crontab 里每天 18:00 给飞书发「今日错题复习提醒」，学生名曲凌松，用 daily-review-reminder 那套，顺便 dry-run 先看文案。
错题本里 type:mistake-record 的 YAML 哪些字段必填？给我一份最小合法示例，并说明 tags 和 review-round 怎么填。
孩子物理第二单元二力平衡，错题类型老是受力分析错。跑一下 weak-points 看 TOP5 薄弱知识点，并解释怎么跟单元 README 双向链接。
娃初二，刚月考完，我拍了卷子上的错题照片在 D:\photos\math-mid.jpg，想按人教版八下目录归档到 Obsidian 里，还要标知识点和错因，后面能按艾宾浩斯提醒复习。帮我从录入到建好 frontmatter 全流程。
今天有什么要复习的？学生档案在 data/mistake-notebook/students/小林/profile.md，别直接甩 PDF，先给我文字列表我选科目。
学校让家长填在线问卷星链接里的满意度调查，帮我组织答题要点，不要错题本 workflow。
帮我用 Anki 做英语四级单词卡，每天 50 个新词，不要错题本也不要艾宾浩斯跟你们那个 mistake-notebook 数据目录。
这道高一化学平衡题我完全不会做，把题干抄给你了，一步步讲思路就行，不用建错题档案也不用 Obsidian。
帮我把这篇作文润色成中考范文风格，不涉及错题录入、导出 PDF、薄弱知识点统计。
写一个 React Todo 网页练习，跟中小学错题管理、艾宾浩斯、飞书提醒都无关。
用 LaTeX 写一份普通课堂笔记模板（定理/例题环境），不要 mistake-record frontmatter、不要 classify.py。

test_results.query: 生成 2026 年 3 月的月度错题报告，学生曲凌松，输出 markdown 到 reports/，要含各学科错题数和趋势。
用我们仓库里的 export 脚本，把今日到期的物理错题打成 PDF，路径用 exports/physics-review.pdf，我要发微信给孩子。
misstake notebook 里「力的合成」那道错题今天该第几轮了？顺便给我生成 2 道变式举一反三，输出到 practice 目录。
我刚 clone 了带 mistake-notebook skill 的项目，第一次跑，先 check-deps 再告诉我 playwright 和 markdown2 怎么装，别跳过依赖检查。
用 Python pandas 读班级成绩 xlsx，算每个学生总分排名，输出到新的 sheet。这跟个人错题 Obsidian 仓库无关。
初三数学只问这一道几何证明怎么做，不用举一反三、不用更新 review-round、不用 generate-practice。
期末考试还有两周，给我一份通用复习时间表（语文数学英语物理），不要录入具体错题、不要 PDF 导出脚本、不要你们 skill 里的 analyze.py。
我拍了一张超市小票想 OCR 记账进 Notion，别用错题分类也别提学生 profile.md。

history.description: Use this skill when users manage K-12 wrong answers through an Obsidian-based workflow with Ebbinghaus-spaced review. Trigger for: archiving mistakes from photos or text into structured records, querying daily review due items, batch-updating review progress after studying, analyzing weak knowledge points, generating practice variants, or configuring scheduled reminders. Key markers include mentions of "错题" (wrong answers), review scheduling, student profiles in data/mistake-notebook directories, YAML frontmatter with type:mistake-record, or scripts handling review exports and progress updates. Do not use for single-problem tutoring without record-keeping, generic study planners, Anki decks, spreadsheet grading, or unrelated development tasks.
